name: Pastry for 9-inch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lard and shortening with a pastry cutter until combined.
2. Add the flour and salt, mixing until coarse grains form.
3. Gradually add ice water, one teaspoon at a time, stirring until the dough comes together and no longer sticks to the bowl.
4. Dust a lightly floured surface and gently press the dough ball into an even layer.
5. Lightly dust the top of the dough with flour, then roll out from the center, dusting the work surface as needed.
6. Fold the dough in half, then fold again so it's easier to transfer to the pie plate.
7. Place the rolled-out dough in the plate and unfold.
8. Trim the edges, prick the bottom of the pastry all over with a fork, and cover the outer edges with tinfoil to prevent burning.
9. Bake at 475°F (450°F for a glass pie plate) for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
